    "Bond pattern broken in masonry wall",
    "Failure to maintain proper head joint alignment and overlap"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Rebuild affected sections of the masonry wall to establish a proper, continuous bond pattern",
    "Ensure head joints align vertically in alternate courses as required by code"

  "rationale": "A broken bond pattern violates structural and aesthetic requirements of TMS 402/602. Unless specifically engineered as stack bond with prescriptive joint reinforcement, running bond must maintain proper overlap (typically at least one-fourth of the unit length) to ensure structural integrity and load distribution.",

    "TMS 402/602",
    "IRC Section R606"
  ]
